facts: The US Ambassador to the UN confirmed Washington will invoke Article 51 collective defence consultations with Israel.
The emergency UN Security Council session is currently deadlocked, with Russia and China urging general restraint without condemning Tehran.
Japan's Ministry of Foreign Affairs issued a statement prioritizing the security of energy supply chains through the Strait of Hormuz.
The African Union Peace and Security Council is monitoring the situation, emphasizing the disproportionate economic impact on the Global South.
